message:
✨ Mission Browser: index-based loading, 6h cache, logo contrast (#1564)

- Replace sequential directory crawling (hundreds of API calls) with
  single index.json fetch (~400KB, 387 missions) for instant loading
- Add localStorage persistence with 6-hour TTL — missions load
  instantly on page reload without any API calls
- Use direct fetch() instead of api.get() for public /api/missions/file
  endpoint to bypass backend availability gate on initial load
- Add white/frosted backdrop behind project logos and category icons
  on installer cards for contrast on gradient backgrounds
- Add defensive (|| []) guards on arrays in Clusters, Dashboard, and
  GPUReservations to prevent crashes when hook data is undefined
- Capture stack traces in console error scan for better debugging

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
